description_long: This stool features a round, white cushioned seat supported by a light blue metal frame. The frame consists of four slender legs that curve outward at the base, connected by a circular support ring and additional crossbars for stability. The seat appears to be upholstered in a smooth, soft material, likely vinyl or leather, with subtle edge detailing. The metal legs have a powder-coated finish, giving them a sleek and modern appearance. The stool lacks a backrest and footrest, emphasizing its minimalist and functional design. Its compact size and sturdy construction make it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, bus stops, or public waiting areas.
description: A round, white cushioned stool with a light blue metal frame and four curved legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round white seat and the symmetrical arrangement of the four blue metal legs.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curved legs and the connecting crossbars beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the circular support ring and the even spacing of the legs.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the seat and the back pair of legs with the same structural details.
